Variables.Name: ExpressionGUID
Variables.Description: GUID that should be unique within the material, this is used for parameter renaming.

Variables.Name: Group
Variables.Description: The name of the parameter Group to display in MaterialInstance Editor. Default is None group

Variables.Name: SortPriority
Variables.Description: Controls where the this parameter is displayed in a material instance parameter list.  The lower the number the higher up in the parameter list.
